creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
jadawin     2010-10-25 15:08:10 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/dissy          Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    devel/dissy/files    patch-setup.py 
  Log:
  Dissy is a graphical frontend to the objdump disassembler. Dissy can be used
  for debugging and browsing compiler-generated code.
  
  WWW:    http://code.google.com/p/dissy/
  
  PR:             ports/151609
  Submitted by:   Sofian Brabez <sbrabez at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.4094    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +38 -0     ports/devel/dissy/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/dissy/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +12 -0     ports/devel/dissy/files/patch-setup.py (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/devel/dissy/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +79 -0     ports/devel/dissy/pkg-plist (new)
